meta.title: Eternal Exodus - a 2D monster-catching RPG set in the Afterlife, with crafting and fusion
meta.description: A retro monster-catching/fusing game set in the afterlife, inspired by the Shin Megami Tensei series. Catch & fuse demons as you journey through Hell.
meta.keywords: indie rpg game monster-catching fusing crafting 2d pixel retro

main_tagline: Catch and fuse demons in your journey to conquer the afterlife.
main_description: Finally, a monster-catching game with a real story
sub_description: Inspired by a wide range of philosophical and mystical texts - everything from The Republic to The Ra Material - Eternal Exodus takes you on a unique journey to uncover the metaphysical secrets of the universe and tear open the fabric of reality.
release_info: March 2026 on PlayStation 4 & 5, Nintendo Switch, Steam, and Epic.
development_notice: Game still in development. Some things may change.

screenshot_captions.screenshot1: Begin your journey in the humble village of Minden
screenshot_captions.screenshot4: Explore a beautiful world like no other
screenshot_captions.screenshot7: And take on an evil empire

features.press_turn: Press-turn combat: exploit enemies' weaknesses to gain free turns
features.learn_spells: Learn spells from weapons & armor (like Final Fantasy IX)
features.languages: English, Spanish, Japanese, Chinese, Brazilian Portuguese, French, and German

strategy_description: Strategic turn-based combat that rewards you with extra turns as you exploit enemies' weaknesses.
